questions.question: The molar conductivity of an electrolyte increases with:
questions.explanation: Molar conductivity increases with decrease in concentration (dilution) because the volume containing one mole of electrolyte increases.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: The device used to convert chemical energy from fuel into electrical energy is:
questions.explanation: Fuel cells are galvanic cells that use energy of combustion of fuels like hydrogen, methane, methanol etc. to generate electrical energy.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: Which of the following is used as an electrode in a lead storage battery?
questions.explanation: In a lead storage battery, the anode is lead (Pb) and the cathode is a grid of lead packed with lead dioxide (PbO₂).
questions.subject: Chemistry
